headline: A Look At KKR (KKR) Valuation As It Releases Macro Outlook And Expands With New Milan Office
summary: KKR (KKR) stock is back in focus after the firm released its 2026 mid year global macro outlook, The Divergence Conundrum, along with plans to open a new office in Milan to deepen its presence in Italy. See our latest analysis for KKR. These announcements come after a mixed run for the stock, with the share price at US$95.02, a 90 day share price return of 13.28% but a year to date share price decline of 26.28%. The five year total shareholder return of 73.81% reflects a much stronger longer...
